6-K 1 globex_6k.htm FORM 6-K Globex Corp Form 6-K

GLOBEX CORPORATION

Form 6-K – Report of Foreign Private Issuer

Pursuant to Rule 13a-16 or 15d-16 of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934

For the month of March 2024

Item 1. Business Overview

Globex Corp designs and manufactures advanced energy storage systems for renewable grid applications. Revenue for Q1 2024 increased 18% year-over-year, driven by strong demand from solar farm operators in South‑East Asia.

Item 2. Risk Factors

The company faces supply‑chain constraints in lithium carbonate sourcing and rising logistics costs. Currency exposure to the EUR/USD rate remains a material risk factor for European operations.

Item 3. Management Discussion

Operating margins improved to 14.2% as productivity initiatives offset raw material inflation. Capital expenditures for the new Singapore facility totalled USD 42 million in Q1 2024.
